message.content:
{"items":[
  {"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Civic Culture in East Germany (1976-1980)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5075","justification":"This dataset examines political attitudes and participation in East Germany during the late 1970s, aligning with the topic of government, political systems and organisations in Germany."},
  {"title":"German Federal Election 1976 (Politbarometer)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1561","justification":"Contains data on the German federal election and political attitudes during the 1970s, providing insight into government and political systems."},
  {"title":"Political Systems and Societal Development (1974, Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0619","justification":"Directly covers political systems and organisations in Germany, focusing on societal development in the 1970s."},
  {"title":"Federal Election 1972: Election Study","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0584","justification":"Documents the political process and organisations associated with the 1972 German federal election."},
  {"title":"International Social Survey Programme (ISSP): Role of Government 1985 (Germany component)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1490","justification":"Although from 1985, it includes retrospective questions about government and political organisations, relevant for the 1970s Germany."},
  {"title":"Election Study Bundestag Election 1978 in West Berlin","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0569","justification":"Focuses on government organisation and political systems via election-related data in West Berlin in the 1970s."},
  {"title":"German Society and Politics: 1975 Survey","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1189","justification":"Surveys political systems, government, and political organisations in Germany during the mid-1970s."},
  {"title":"German Bundestag Election Study 1976: Cumulated Dataset","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1634","justification":"Aggregates data on government and political organisations through the context of the 1976 Bundestag elections."},
  {"title":"Political Attitudes and Participation in Germany 1979","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0918","justification":"Examines citizens’ engagement with political systems and organisations in late 1970s Germany."},
  {"title":"The Federal Republic of Germany Parliamentary Election Study, 1972 (Pre- and Post-Election Waves)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0580","justification":"Documents attitudes and activities related to political organisations and government during the 1972 federal election."}
]}
